title: Looking for a Monday.com expert to help pulse a complicated formula into an email
excerpt:

posts.author: Janice_Graydon (Janice Graydon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’ve been trying to get a formula column pulsed into an email and am at my wits end. I’ve tried Zapier and general caster and have come up against roadblocks with both, but I am also new to them both and am not getting the support I need to help figure it out. Its a complicated formula but I have it working in a Monday.com column, I just can’t then pulse that into an email.

If you are willing to help for hire, please contact me ASAP! Thanks!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Janice_Graydon

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements. We also have extensive experience with formulas and bespoke solutions.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Janice_Graydon, and thanks for checking in with the community!

This sounds like a pretty interesting use case and I’d be happy to see how the team at CarbonWeb can help. Our team has experience doing complex integrations and am willing to bet they’ve seen something like this before.

If you want to schedule some time with me so that we can learn a bit more, I would welcome a conversation! Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get this project finished!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
